_comment: pi-blackhole config tuned for auto compaction, minimal tail, high-context session model, and separate worker fallback chains
_notes: Thresholds are fixed token counts; pi-blackhole does not currently support percentage-based thresholds.
compactAfterTokens is set to the recommended high-context preset: 180000, about 65% of the current 272K session model.
Worker input caps follow the documented high-context preset and fit the 512K MiniMax-M3 fallback with the 8000-token agent loop reserve.
Resolution order per worker: primary model, stage fallback, then the current session model as final fallback.

observerModel._comment: Observer primary: fast extraction model for frequent observation runs.

reflectorModel._comment: Reflector primary: stronger synthesis model for durable reflections.

dropperModel._comment: Dropper primary: judgment/prioritization model for pruning observations.
